_provenance: reconstructed-from-trace-run-1.zip + error-context-run-1.md page-snapshot at test failure moment.
url_at_failure: http://localhost:5173/candidate/login (per page-snapshot evidence — heading 'Your password is now set! Please log in using it.' is visible)

page_snapshot_at_failure.heading_h1: Your password is now set! Please log in using it.

form_state.email_field: test.unregistered2@openvaa.org (pre-filled — populated by candCtx.newUserEmail = email from register/password/+page.svelte:95)

page_snapshot_at_failure._LANDMARK: The user successfully landed on /candidate/login WITH email pre-filled, but no automated agent filled the password field because the helper's branch was skipped. Sign-in button remains disabled.

cookies.name: sb-127-auth-token
cookies._note: Cookie STILL VALID — the user has an authenticated session. The /candidate/login page does not auto-redirect them to /candidate because (per the deliberate flow at register/password/+page.svelte:78-80) the login page is the canonical clean-auth entry point post-registration.

_hydration_signal: window.__phase79RcaHydrated was NEVER set throughout this test run. The (protected)/+layout.svelte $effect block did not fire because the user never reached a /candidate/(protected)/ route.
_H2_disproof: HYPOTHESIS 2 (ToU hydration timing race) is DISPROVEN BY ABSENCE OF EXERCISE. The protected layout never rendered, so its $derived chain over data.candidateUserData.candidate.terms_of_use_accepted never had a chance to race. The 'terms-checkbox not visible' failure is NOT a hydration race — it is a 'we never got to the page that renders the checkbox' failure.
_failure_locator: page.getByTestId('terms-checkbox') — NOT VISIBLE because we are on /candidate/login (which renders a Login form), NOT on /candidate/(protected) (which would render <TermsOfUseForm>)
